---
title: "kalshi_paginate"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `kalshi_paginate()`

Paginate Through Kalshi API Results

## Usage

```r
kalshi_paginate(
  path,
  result_key,
  query = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE,
  max_pages = NULL
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `path` | Character. The API endpoint path. |
| `result_key` | Character. The key in the response containing results. |
| `query` | Named list. Additional query parameters. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum number of pages to fetch. NULL for all. |

## Value

A list of all results across pages.

## Description

Internal helper to handle cursor-based pagination.
